MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CSM-12-839731 WITH CASE CGC-12-520924 DEC; MEMO OF P & A AND POS FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHEN, TOM HONG HUSBAND CHEN, WENDY WU WIFE HEARING SET FOR JUN-29-2012 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL PRESENTED THE COURT WITH A STIPULATION AT THE HEARING. AFTER HEARING, THE COURT RULED AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFFS TOM CHEN AND WENDY CHEN'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CSM-12-839731 WITH CASE CGC-12-520924 IS GRANTED. THE CASES ARE CONSOLIDATED FOR ALL PURPOSES. CGC-12-520924 SHALL BE THE LEAD CASE AND ALL FURTHER FILINGS SHALL BE UNDER THE LEAD CASE. THE TRIAL DATE IN THE SMALL CLAIMS CASE IS VACATED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; NOT REPORTED.
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUL-23-2013 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. CASE #839731 AND #526045 CONSOLIDATED WITH #520924. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI MINUTES FOR JUN-29-2012 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CSM-12-839731 WITH CASE CGC-12-520924
Off Calendar Jun-29-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
John Chow, Esq., of Tsao-Wu, Chow & Yee, Tel. 415.777.1688, appearing for Plaintiff and moving party.

No other appearance. Plaintiff's counsel presented the court with a stipulation at the hearing. After hearing, the court ruled as follows: PLAINTIFFS TOM CHEN and WENDY CHEN'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CSM-12-839731 WITH CASE CGC-12-520924 is granted. The cases are consolidated for all purposes. CGC-12-520924 shall be the lead case and all further filings shall be under the lead case. The trial date in the small claims case is vacated. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported.
